listings.title: Kodak Brownie Hawkeye Camera Flash Model with Carrying Case – NOT TEST

listings.title: Guitar, carved archtop
listings.body: Fully carved Loar  LH650 16" lower bout archtop in very good condition. 2 blemishes, a small rub in the nitro finish and a small scratch, both shown in photos. A couple of tiny dings. Otherwise no issues. Frets have no discernable wear.  Includes hard shell case

listings.title: MarkBass Compressore
listings.body: Tube-Powered bass compressor from the bass experts. Effect is subtle, musical. Being sold by original owner. Never gigged out. In great shape, with original carton.

listings.title: Metabo Burnishing Kit (Made in Germany) - New in Box
listings.body: Thought I would use this burnisher to polish my stainless steel tables but am too lazy.  Comes with all original accessories and 3 pack  non-woven fleece belt meant to polish table legs.  There is a dent on the side of the metal box.  No low ballers, please.  I'm in no rush to sell. https://www.amazon.com/Metabo-602259620-SE17-200-Burnishing-Machine/dp/B07C3TQ9JV https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B000VE6DCE/ref=ppx_yo_dt_b_search_asin_title?ie=UTF8&psc=1 Please note that I live in northern Westchester and only free to meet up in NYC on Sunday (sometimes Saturday) morning and meet curbside in Manhattan's Inwood, Eastside/Downtown Brooklyn, Navy Yard, Ft. Greene, Clinton Hill, North Williamsburg, Greenpoint, LIC/Queens or along the Sprain/Taconic. Other locations on a case-by-case basis, and with a small fee to cover time and gas.  I would need to know by Friday afternoon.  This is a bit bulky and heavy (~ 45 lbs) so having a car is advised if you're not by one of the meetup locations.  Preference for meeting up in Inwood or Chinatown when in NYC. When replying, let me where and when you would like to meet meet along with your phone number. Cash and carry.  All sales final. Ad will be deleted once sold. Polisher/Burnisher

listings.body: On site metal tool storage unit.

listings.title: 59" acrylic claw foot tub
listings.body: Like-new acrylic claw foot tub, purchased from Wayfair one year ago and barely used (fewer than 10 times). In perfect condition, we just bought a bigger one. Pick up or can delivery locally. Paid $1100 for it. Will take best offer. https://www.wayfair.com/home-improvement/pdp/woodbridge-59-x-28-clawfoot-soaking-acrylic-bathtub-wdbr1560.html?piid=51226569%2C61051262

listings.title: Hummels collection !!!
listings.body: 16 Hummels - many from the 1930s. Excellent condition. Buy whole collection or individually. Chick girl, barnyard hero, chimney sweep, little scholar, on vacation, birdwatcher, baking day, stormy weather, goose girl, playmates, sweet music, joyful ashtray and  more.

listings.title: Hummel - Little Scholar 1935-1949
listings.body: MJ Hummel Little Scholar vintage from 1935-1949.  Excellent condition.

listings.body: Hummel - Playmates  - boy with rabbits , bunnies 1950-1955 Vintage. excellent condition  7, 58/0

listings.title: Hummel - Barnyard Hero 1935-1949
listings.body: Barnyard Hero Hummel from 1935-1949. #195/1 Excellent condition.

listings.title: Hummel - Chick Girl bookend - 1935-1949
listings.body: Hummel Chick Girl bookend from 1935-1949.  Excellent condition. Also available for $30 is the Playmates bookend from 1935-1949 (which has a chip in it). Vintage.

listings.title: Hummel - Playmates bookend 1935-1949
listings.body: Hummel Playmates bookend from 1935-1949. Vintage.  His hat feather and the rabbit ear are chipped off. Also available but in excellent condition is the matching bookend - Chick Girl.

listings.title: Shrek operation
listings.body: Shrek operation . Comes complete no parts missing and with batteries. Works great !
